domain_hint: Finite element analysis of a titanium acetabular cup hip implant under ISO 7206-4 loading for 510(k) regulatory submission
ambiguity_notes: Contradiction A — element formulation (C3D10 stated in simulation plan vs. C3D4 found in mesh report appendix for Variants B/C); Contradiction B — interference fit preload value (0.05 mm documented vs. 0.025 mm implemented in input deck); Contradiction C — validation agreement claim (8% average stated in executive summary vs. 23% worst-case discrepancy at safety-critical gauge location SG-04 buried in validation report); Contradiction D — modal analysis boundary conditions (in-situ conditions stated in simulation plan but only free-free results appear in any deliverable, with no explanation)
